subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Thy letter which thou didst send unto Muhammad-'Ali hath indeed arrived, and this servant hath perused it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قد حضر کتابک الذی ارسلته الی محمد قبل علی علیه بهائی و قرئه العبد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @growth of the Cause
